title: Battle of Clak'dor VII
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Youmay|the battle during the Clone Wars|the [[Liberation of Clak'dor VII|battle]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]}} {{Conjecture|legends}} {{Battle |prev= |conc= |next= |image=[[File:Battle_of_Clakdor_VII.jpg]] |name=Battle of Clak'dor VII |conflict=[[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]''[[Labyrinth of Evil]]'' |date=Sometime between [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] and [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]]''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' |place=[[Clak'dor VII/Legends|Clak'dor VII]] |result= |side1=[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] |side2=[[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] |side3= |side4= |commanders1= |commanders2= |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1= |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |forces1= |forces2= |forces3= |forces4= |casual1= |casual2= |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|I started out as a technician—design, installation, the whole gamut. Gradually, I worked my way up.''"
"''Up, maybe. But you're on the wrong side in this war. Your entire species.''"
"''Clak'dor Seven had little choice. The Separatists were offering unrestricted access to hyperspace routes, better deals on trade goods, no interference… As for me, I was already working for the guild. One day it was business as usual, the next—on the heels of what happened on Geonosis, at any rate—the guild was suddenly at war with the Republic.|[[Thal K'sar]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]]|}} During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], a '''battle''' took place on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Clak'dor VII/Legends|Clak'dor VII]]. ==Appearances== *[[Republic 73|''Republic'' 73]] {{C|Possible mention}} *''[[Labyrinth of Evil]]'' {{1stm}} {{Imo}} ==Sources== *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |es=Batalla de Clak'dor VII (Guerras Clon) }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Clak'dor VII, battle of}} [[Category:Battles of Clak'dor VII]] [[Category:Battles of the Clone Wars]]
